compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add config generation section to onboarding SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Add a config generation phase to plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md that instructs Claude to generate dso-config.conf from conversation understanding.

### Requirements:
1. Config generation section/phase after the Socratic dialogue completes
2. Ticket prefix derivation from project name (e.g., 'my-app' → 'ma' or 'myapp')
3. CI workflow contextual logic: when no .github/workflows exist, offer example workflows instead of prompting for names
4. ACLI_VERSION and ACLI_SHA256 auto-suggestion (via WebFetch of latest release or bundled defaults)
5. Reference all dso-config.conf key categories: format, ci, commands, jira, design, tickets, merge, version, test

### Reference files:
- plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md (existing config generation logic to port)
- plugins/dso/scripts/acli-version-resolver.sh (ACLI lookup)
- plugins/dso/scripts/ci-generator.sh (CI workflow generation)

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (modify — add config generation phase)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md mentions ticket prefix derivation
  Verify: grep -qi 'ticket.*prefix\|prefix.*project' plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md mentions ACLI auto-suggestion
  Verify: grep -qi 'ACLI_VERSION\|acli.*version' plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Remove .test-index RED marker
  Verify: ! grep -q 'onboarding/SKILL.md.*\[test_config' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Ticket reviewed. Task is to add config generation details to plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md so RED tests pass GREEN. Tests require: ticket+prefix mentions, example+workflow mentions, and ACLI_VERSION or acli-version-resolver mention.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: SKILL.md read. Current Phase 3 has 3 steps: Present Summary, Write .claude/project-understanding.md, Offer /dso:architect-foundation. Need to add config generation subsection covering: ticket prefix derivation, CI workflow examples, ACLI_VERSION auto-suggestion, and dso-config.conf key categories.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: RED tests confirmed. Three failing tests: test_ticket_prefix_derivation (needs 'ticket' AND 'prefix'), test_ci_workflow_examples (needs 'example' AND 'workflow'), test_acli_auto_suggestion (needs 'ACLI_VERSION' or 'acli-version-resolver'). Note: test_config_generation_section and test_config_key_categories are already GREEN (SKILL.md has 'config' and 'dso-config.conf' references, and 'test', 'ci', 'commands', 'design', 'format' words already exist in the file).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Added config generation subsection (Step 2b) to Phase 3 of SKILL.md. Content includes: ticket prefix derivation (my-app → MA), CI workflow examples with ci-generator.sh, ACLI_VERSION auto-suggestion via acli-version-resolver.sh, and all 9 dso-config.conf key categories (format, ci, commands, jira, design, tickets, merge, version, test). Updated Quick Reference table to mention config generation.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: All 17 tests pass GREEN (17 PASSED, 0 FAILED). The three formerly RED tests now pass: test_ticket_prefix_derivation, test_ci_workflow_examples, test_acli_auto_suggestion. Removing RED marker from .test-index next.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: RED marker [test_ticket_prefix_derivation] removed from .test-index line 179. Entry now reads: 'plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md: tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh, tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh'. Task complete: 17/17 tests GREEN, RED marker removed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Added config generation with ticket prefix, CI examples, ACLI auto-suggestion
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
